efficiencyOverride.label: Efficiency fallback
efficiencyOverride.hintLearned: TeslaMate has already learned the efficiency — the learned value takes precedence, the fallback is inactive.
efficiencyOverride.hintNotLearned: Used for the consumption estimate until TeslaMate has learned the efficiency from your first charging sessions. Leave empty to remove. Existing drives are automatically recalculated (≤60 s).

sync.title: Sync
sync.errorHint: Error details as a tooltip on the status badge.
sync.resyncConfirmMessage: All sync watermarks will be reset and fully resynced on the worker's next tick. Continue?
sync.resyncSuccess: Watermarks reset — the worker will fetch everything again on its next tick (≤60 s).

display.title: Display
display.note: The time zone is set via the APP_TIMEZONE environment variable. Date/unit format is fixed to de-DE / km in the MVP.

passwordChange.success: Password changed. Other signed-in sessions were logged out.

teslamateTest.title: TeslaMate direct test
teslamateTest.description: Read-only test against TESLAMATE_DATABASE_URL from the web container (only counts drives, writes nothing).
teslamateTest.envNotSet: TESLAMATE_DATABASE_URL is not set in the web container — this test is for diagnostics only and not needed in normal operation, since only the worker reads the TeslaMate database.
teslamateTest.envNotSetMessage: TESLAMATE_DATABASE_URL is not set in the web container. That's fine in normal operation — only the worker needs it.
teslamateTest.successMessage: Connection successful — {count} drives found in the TeslaMate database.

hints.dbUnreachable: The Tripatlas database is not reachable. Is the db container running? Is DATABASE_URL correctly set in the web container?
hints.neverSynced: Never synced yet. Is the worker container running? Is TESLAMATE_DATABASE_URL set in the worker?
hints.someNeverSynced: At least one area has never synced successfully. Check the worker logs: docker compose logs worker.
hints.stale: The last successful sync was a while ago. Is the worker container still running? Check the docker logs: docker compose logs worker.
hints.runFailed: At least one sync run failed — see the error message below the relevant row.

errors.newPasswordMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters.
